name: No Bake Caramel Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, margarine, and evaporated milk in a saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Add the instant butterscotch pudding mix and stir until well combined.
4. Stir in the quick oats.
5. Remove from heat and let cool for 15 minutes.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Allow cookies to cool completely before serving.
